heading: National Transportation Week
label: 133 National Transportation Week
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)13336:166., , .May 14, 1962Pub. L. 87–44976 Stat. 69
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)13336:166., , .May 14, 1962Pub. L. 87–44976 Stat. 69

children.text: designating the week that includes the third Friday of May as National Transportation Week; and

inviting the people of the United States to observe National Transportation Week with appropriate ceremonies and activities as a tribute to the men and women who, night and day, move goods and individuals throughout the United States.
